overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a narrative adventure game showing a woman and child walking through a sunlit forest into a medieval-style woodland camp with red fabric canopies. The characters navigate rocky terrain, pass a stream, and enter a populated camp area with other NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking down rocky slope holding child's hand, navigating uneven terrain

entered.detail: steep rocky incline with loose stones and boulders
dense coniferous trees surrounding the path
red fabric canopy visible in the distance between trees
narrow stream running alongside the rocky path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit rocky forest trail where two characters descend a slope. Pine trees surround the path and a stream runs along the right side. In the distance, red fabric canopies mark a camp destination.

events.description: reaching stream edge and stone marker at camp perimeter
slowing to approach and interact with NPC standing at entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching camp along stream edge, greeting woman in white dress standing near entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress standing at camp entrance facing the approaching characters

entered.detail: tall stone pillar with moss near the stream bank
white canvas tent visible through the trees
stone fire pit with cooking utensils arranged nearby

segments.scene_description: The characters arrive at the camp entrance beside a stream, passing a stone marker. A woman in a white dress stands near the entrance. The red canopy grows closer overhead, and camp tents become visible through the trees as they enter the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: woodland camp with red fabric canopy

events.description: entering fully shaded camp area beneath red fabric canopy
navigating through seated villagers and camp activities

agents.ego_description: walking through busy camp holding child's hand, passing seated villagers and campfires

notable_agents.action: seated villager tending to camp tasks near wooden bench
group of villagers gathered near tents in conversation

entered.detail: rough-hewn wooden table with supplies and baskets
active campfire with smoke rising beneath the canopy
wooden bench where villagers are seated

segments.scene_description: The characters move deep into the camp beneath a large red fabric canopy that filters the sunlight. They navigate between wooden tables, fire pits, and seated villagers engaged in various activities. The environment is bustling with camp life as they proceed through the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit forest trail into the bustling heart of a medieval woodland camp. It begins by descending a rocky slope flanked by pine trees and a running stream, with red fabric canopies visible in the far distance. As the characters reach the camp entrance, the camera passes a stone marker and a woman in a white dress, while the surrounding trees give way to the first signs of the settlement. The scene then shifts deep into the camp, moving beneath a large red canopy that filters the sunlight over a lively area of wooden tables and fire pits. Finally, the camera glides through the settlement, weaving past seated villagers engaged in various activities.
